target: 10. Final Post

I'd like to inform all island residents.
An unknown disaster has occurred centered around the Hidogoshira Shrine.
Those wishing to evacuate to the mainland should board the upcoming temporary ferry.
Shin-chan, the ferry's already here!

Ah, we made it.
I just hope Sou and Tokiko can make it too.

There might be others hiding too…
I just hope they can make it here somehow.

Look, I could've sworn someone else was at the school too.
Didn't you hear a big noise from the classroom?

If they were evacuating like us,
they might've been better off coming here with us.

If the power was still on,
I might've gone to check things out.

But thinking about the risk of being attacked by shadows in the dark,
it was better not to move at all.
Yeah, I get it…

Come on, hurry up and board.
Maybe there's someone inside like Sou or Tokiko.
Yeah!

Huh?
No one's inside the boat.

What do we do?
Maybe we should go back to the entrance and check if Tokiko's coming.
Shin-chan?

You don't need to do that.
Just stay quiet here.
Eh…?
This is where it ends.
What are you even saying--
